headline: Life Science Instrumentation Market Forecast Report 2025-2031: Expanding Activities in Genomics, Proteomics, and Drug Discovery with Thermo Fisher Scientific, Danaher, Agilent, and Shimadzu Leading
summary: The global life science instrumentation market is forecasted to grow from USD 63.4 billion in 2025 to USD 92.5 billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 6.5%. Key drivers include increased R&D funding, rising proteomics research, and growing disease prevalence. In 2025, the spectroscopy segment dominated the market owing to its integration in pharmaceutical and biotechnology research. The research applications sector is set to achieve the highest growth, with significant strides in genomics and drug discove
